current.summary: Fixed TUI help bar layout bug; Phase 10 Polish underway

activeWork.description: Phase 10 Polish. Fixed critical layout bug where help bar wrapping causes top bar disappearance. Remaining work: responsive edge cases, mouse parity audit, accessibility, golden test expansion.
activeWork.progress: Bug fixed: help bar height changes (tab switches Config→Content) now trigger content model resizing. Extracted resizeContent() helper, called from updateNavState(). Tests added and passing. Code committed and pushed. Next: choose Phase 10 area (responsive/mouse/a11y/golden tests) and begin audit.

git.lastCommit: Fixed help bar layout bug with content resizing

recentDecisions: Extract resizeContent() helper for reuse in WindowSizeMsg and updateNavState()
Detect help bar height changes and recalculate content models in updateNavState()
Verify fix with test switching Config (1-line) to Content (2-line) hints
nextSteps: Select Phase 10 Polish focus area: responsive layout, mouse parity, accessibility, or golden tests
Run responsive tests at edge sizes (60x20, narrow/wide terminals)
Audit all interactive elements for zone.Mark + click handler coverage
Test keyboard-only and screen reader accessibility
Expand golden file baselines for search states, toasts, gallery drill-in

context.notes: Phases 1-9 complete. Phase 10 (Polish) is open-ended improvement work. TUI v3 uses Flexoki color scheme, bracket hotkeys, no dropdowns. Help bar layout fix was critical blocker — root cause was updateNavState() changing help bar height (1↔2 lines on tab switches) without recalculating content model sizes. Solution: extract resizeContent() helper, call it from updateNavState() to detect and handle height changes. CI passes, linting clean. Ready for next Polish area focus.
